label: VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers

node.label: VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers
node.definition: VQ-VAE maps continuous encoder outputs to entries in a learned discrete codebook, turning images, audio, or other modalities into reusable tokens.
node.why_it_matters: The role of VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers is to connect Autoencoders, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units to downstream capabilities including Multimodal foundation models.
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Autoencoders, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.

dependencies.rationale: VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers extends or specializes the architecture family Autoencoders.
VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers consumes, emits, or organizes information using Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers consumes, emits, or organizes information using Embeddings & distributed representations.
VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Reconstruction objectives.
